name: Tabbouleh Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and brown both sides for about 5 to 6 minutes per side. Remove the chicken from the skillet.
3. Add onions and cook until translucent, about 2 to 3 minutes. Add Tabbouleh (including spice packet), remaining spices, broth, and 1 cup hot water. Arrange the chicken breasts on top of the Tabbouleh.
4. Cover; reduce heat to medium-low. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
